name: a rule applying to an IaC dialect is tagged for the IaC development path
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --rule-id g-hashicorp-pin --applies-to '{"iac_dialects":["terraform"],"linguist_aliases":["hcl"]}' 2>e.txt; grep -q 'development_paths=iac' e.txt && echo iac-rule-tagged 1>&2
